/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_yaml_reader.dir/test/test_reader.cpp.o -o test_yaml_reader   -L/root/ros2_ws/build/libyaml_vendor/libyaml_install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/libyaml_vendor/libyaml_install/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a -lyaml /root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib/librcpputils.so -pthread /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
